visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is a 2D animation with a blue background. A bald character with glasses and a small beard walks from left to right while holding a blue phone to his ear. He passes various storefronts including a fried chicken shop with a red sign. (2) The background changes to a street at night as the character passes a stall with a yellow awning and red text. (3) The scene shifts to the exterior of a McDonald's restaurant with its iconic red and yellow logo. (4) The character is seen indoors in front of a shelf filled with small monster-like figurines. He looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression. (5) A transition occurs with text stating 'a few months later'. The character is now in a living room with a brown couch and a TV. Another character with dark hair and a green shirt enters. (6) The dark-haired character looks shocked with wide eyes and open mouth. The bald character is shown with an extremely large, rounded belly. (7) A close-up shot focuses on the character's distended belly, showing the skin stretched and an 'X' marking the navel. (8) The two characters are in an office-like setting with a computer monitor. The dark-haired character leans in with a smug expression while the bald character looks annoyed and angry. (9) Large yellow and white text overlays the bald character's face at the end.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Slogan]: 當朋友想說你胖但又不明說. [Slogan]: 完整影片在Youtube. (2) [Subtitle]: 學長 我要去你那裡了喔. [Subtitle]: 要幫你帶雞排嗎? [Subtitle]: 不用 你吃就好. (3) [Subtitle]: 學長 我要過去你家了. [Subtitle]: 要不要吃旁邊那間鹽水雞? [Subtitle]: 不用喔 你吃就好. (4) [Subtitle]: 欸 學長 等等要不要吃麥當勞? [Subtitle]: 大麥克買一送一耶. [Subtitle]: 欸 你吃就好了. (5) [Subtitle]: 就這樣 每次去學長家 都會帶宵夜過去吃. [Subtitle]: 過了幾個月之後. (6) [Subtitle]: 早安 提拉. [Subtitle]: 早安啊. [Subtitle]: 為什麼... [Subtitle]: 幹嘛? [Subtitle]: 為什麼你會懷孕! (7) [Subtitle]: 好 結果我那幾個月直接爆肥. [Subtitle]: 體重來到人生的最巔峰. (8) [Subtitle]: 肚子直接超大一個. [Subtitle]: 天啊 好久沒照鏡子. [Subtitle]: 肚子真的變超大一個的啦. (9) [Subtitle]: 這個大小 恭喜你們 喜提雙胞胎. [Subtitle]: 不要吵啦. (10) [Subtitle]: 沒事啦 就是幸福肥啊. [Subtitle]: 談戀愛一定會這樣子的啦. [Subtitle]: 哎油 很正常啦 不要放在心上. [Subtitle]: 以後多 豬 意飲食就好了啊. [Subtitle]: 不要一直話中帶話. (11) [Subtitle]: 可是學長身材還是維持得很好耶. [Subtitle]: 那你要檢討. (12) [Variety]: 要檢討.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two distinct animated male characters appear throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One character is bald with glasses and a small beard; the other has short dark hair and wears a green shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video uses various flat-colored animated backgrounds including a city street with shops, a simple living room with a couch and TV, and a desk area with a monitor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-pitched, energetic male speech over a bouncy, synthesized comedy BGM. The rhythm is fast and synchronized with the character's walking. (2) A sudden loud 'shock' SFX with high spectral brightness occurs when a character reveals his large belly. The BGM stops briefly for emphasis. (3) The BGM resumes with the same upbeat tempo as the narration continues in a casual but slightly strained voice. (4) The second voice enters, characterized by a lower pitch and a sarcastic, teasing tone. The interaction is rapid, with voices overlapping the music. (5) A final high-pitched 'ping' or digital UI sound effect accompanies the appearance of emphasis text at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Setup -> Inciting Incident -> Climax -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a relatable comedic story about gaining weight and the subtle, teasing ways friends comment on it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a distinctive 2D art style common in Taiwanese web animations to deliver quick comedic beats.
